issue.message: This transaction should be completed with a `commit()` call
This transaction should be completed with a `commit()` call
Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES javadoc for details.
Attribute `autoSizeTextType` is only used in API level 26 and higher (current min is 22)
Avoid passing `null` as the view root (needed to resolve layout parameters on the inflated layout's root element)
Avoid passing `null` as the view root (needed to resolve layout parameters on the inflated layout's root element)
A newer version of androidx.appcompat:appcompat than 1.3.0 is available: 1.7.1
A newer version of com.google.android.material:material than 1.4.0 is available: 1.13.0
A newer version of androidx.constraintlayout:constraintlayout than 2.1.3 is available: 2.2.1
A newer version of androidx.gridlayout:gridlayout than 1.0.0 is available: 1.1.0
A newer version of androidx.core:core-ktx than 1.10.1 is available: 1.18.0
A newer version of androidx.lifecycle:lifecycle-runtime-ktx than 2.6.2 is available: 2.10.0
A newer version of androidx.lifecycle:lifecycle-viewmodel-ktx than 2.6.2 is available: 2.10.0
A newer version of org.jetbrains.kotlinx:kotlinx-coroutines-android than 1.7.3 is available: 1.9.0
A newer version of androidx.test.ext:junit than 1.1.3 is available: 1.3.0
A newer version of androidx.test.espresso:espresso-core than 3.4.0 is available: 3.7.0
A newer version of com.google.zxing:core than 3.4.1 is available: 3.5.3
A newer version of io.coil-kt:coil than 2.4.0 is available: 2.6.0
A newer version of io.coil-kt:coil-gif than 2.4.0 is available: 2.6.0
A newer version of androidx.compose:compose-bom than 2023.06.01 is available: 2026.03.00

issue.errorLine1: <string name="test_only">FOR TEST ONLY\n(Not for commercial use)</string>
<string name="demo_only">FOR DEMO ONLY\n(Not for commercial use)</string>
<string name="test_and_demo">FOR TEST & DEMO ONLY\n(Not for commercial use)</string>
<string name="data_cannot_zero">The data cannot be zero, please enter again</string>
<string name="pls_input_pin_again">PIN Error, Please Retry\n\nPlease Enter PIN</string>
<string name="prompt_input_type">Please Enter Correct Format Of Input Type</string>
<string name="confirm_merchant_scope">Apply for all merchants or current?</string>
<string name="confirm_card_entry_retry">Decline-host message /nPlease retry or /n Try another card</string>
<string name="confirm_eula_continue">You must agree to the EULA to use this device</string>
<string name="confirm_prompt_again">I have accepted the EULA, Don\'t prompt again</string>
<string name="signature_redo">Signature Data is Too Long, Please Sign Again</string>
<string name="receipt_image_too_larger">Receipt Image may be to larger!</string>
<string name="info_emv_trans_online">Do Not Remove Your Card Please!\nProcessing Online…</string>
<string name="on_external_pinpad">\n On the External PIN Pad</string>
<string name="title_default">Thank you for shopping with us!</string>
<string name="confirm_deactivate_warn">Card Will Be Deactivated, Are You Sure?</string>
<string name="confirm_print_fps">Do You Want To Print Receipt?</string>
<string name="confirm_delete_sf">Delete SF Records, Are You Sure?</string>
<string name="confirm_application_update_with_batch_close">To apply the update, please close the current batch.\nDo you want to close now?</string>
<string name="confirm_online_retry_offline">Retry Online Or Offline, Retry Online?</string>
<string name="confirm_total_amount_message">Total Amount: %1$s.\nDo you wish to continue?</string>
<string name="confirm_adjust_tip">Would you like to add this tip?</string>
<string name="confirm_receipt_signature">Do you agree to sign the receipt?</string>
<string name="min_length_verification">The length must be greater than %1$d</string>

issue.message: Avoid object allocations during draw/layout operations (preallocate and reuse instead)
Avoid object allocations during draw/layout operations (preallocate and reuse instead)
It will always be more efficient to use more specific change events if you can. Rely on `notifyDataSetChanged` as a last resort.
Set `android:baselineAligned="false"` on this element for better performance
Set `android:baselineAligned="false"` on this element for better performance
Set `android:baselineAligned="false"` on this element for better performance
Nested weights are bad for performance
Nested weights are bad for performance
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@color/pastel_background` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/POSLinkUIPastel`)
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@color/pastel_background` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/POSLinkUIPastel`)
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `#00FFFFFF` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/POSLinkUIPastel`)

Buttons in button bars should be borderless; use `style="?android:attr/buttonBarButtonStyle"` (and `?android:attr/buttonBarStyle` on the parent)
Buttons in button bars should be borderless; use `style="?android:attr/buttonBarButtonStyle"` (and `?android:attr/buttonBarStyle` on the parent)

Buttons in button bars should be borderless; use `style="?android:attr/buttonBarButtonStyle"` (and `?android:attr/buttonBarStyle` on the parent)
The standard Android way to capitalize CANCEL is "Cancel" (tip: use `@android:string/cancel` instead)
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
String literal in `setText` can not be translated. Use Android resources instead.
`@id/merchantName` can overlap `@id/merchant` if @string/prompt_merchant, @id/merchantName grow due to localized text expansion
`@id/amount_view` can overlap `@id/total_amount` if @string/total_amount, @id/amount_view grow due to localized text expansion
`@id/total_amount` can overlap `TextView-1` if @string/total_amount, @id/total_amount grow due to localized text expansion
`@id/tv_total_price_show_item` can overlap `@id/tv_product_name_show_item` if @id/tv_product_name_show_item, @id/tv_total_price_show_item grow due to localized text expansion
When you define `paddingRight` you should probably also define `paddingLeft` for right-to-left symmetry
When you define `paddingRight` you should probably also define `paddingLeft` for right-to-left symmetry
When you define `paddingLeft` you should probably also define `paddingRight` for right-to-left symmetry
When you define `paddingStart` you should probably also define `paddingEnd` for right-to-left symmetry
Use "`Gravity.START`" instead of "`Gravity.LEFT`" to ensure correct behavior in right-to-left locales
Use "`Gravity.START`" instead of "`Gravity.LEFT`" to ensure correct behavior in right-to-left locales
Use "`Gravity.END`" instead of "`Gravity.RIGHT`" to ensure correct behavior in right-to-left locales
Use "`Gravity.END`" instead of "`Gravity.RIGHT`" to ensure correct behavior in right-to-left locales
Consider replacing `android:paddingRight` with `android:paddingEnd="24dp"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider replacing `android:paddingRight` with `android:paddingEnd="24dp"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider replacing `android:paddingLeft` with `android:paddingStart="24dp"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider replacing `android:layout_alignParentLeft` with `android:layout_alignParentStart="true"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider replacing `android:layout_marginLeft` with `android:layout_marginStart="24dp"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider replacing `android:layout_marginLeft` with `android:layout_marginStart="50dp"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider replacing `android:layout_alignParentRight` with `android:layout_alignParentEnd="true"` to better support right-to-left layouts
Consider replacing `android:layout_marginRight` with `android:layout_marginEnd="24dp"` to better support right-to-left layouts
